narrative.summary: Ramen-focused Toronto spot with strong local following and dependable bowls.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Not much to say cuz me coming back already says it all! I’ve tried other locations before but finally stopped by this one after walking past so many times. The noodles were cooked perfectly with great texture and bold flavors. And their cheesecake? Amazing!!! Always has the right sweetness with fresh fruit flavor. Definitely recommend!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "The shoyu ramen was really good, would definitely get again. Cheese cake is okay. The staff here is very friendly and helpful."

⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Nice spot to get some yummy ramen! Only tried once but I'll be back for more. My first time trying ramen that didnt come from a package. I cant believe I've been missing out this much!!"

blocks.title: The Menu
blocks.body:
RAMEN
⭐ Tonkotsu
   Chashu, black fungus, egg, green onion
• Miso Black
   Chashu, spicy kakuni, egg, shiitake, garlic oil
⭐ Spicy Tantan
   Chashu, ground pork, egg, bamboo shoot, chili
• Chicken Shio
   Chicken Shio broth, chicken breast, egg, black fungus, green onion
• Shoyu
   Chashu, egg, bamboo shoot, green onion
• Tomato
   Chashu, hokkaido scallop, egg, tomato, shiitake
• Vegetarian Miso
   Tofu, daikon, wakame, onions
• Mazemen
   Vegetarian spicy mixed noodle with eggplant peperoncini, corn and green onion

SIDES
• Gyoza
   Pan fried pork dumplings
• Negi Shoga Gyoza
   Pan fried pork dumplings with ginger and green onion
• Gyudon
   Rice with shredded beef and caramelized onions
• Croquette
   Creamy corn deep fried croquettes
• Spicy Slow Cooked Wings
• Zangi
   Hokkaido style fried chicken
• Seaweed Salad

ALCOHOL
• Peach Sake
• Pear Sake
• Sapporo Premium

DESSERT
⭐ Mango Cheesecake
• Yuzu Cheesecake
